positive: A mystical forest silhouette design, central composition, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and interconnected root systems forming abstract, glowing patterns against a deep midnight blue sky. The aesthetic should be highly decorative, utilizing clean line art combined with bold, flat color washes in emerald green, sapphire blue, and soft gold accents. Emphasize strong contrast between the solid black silhouettes of the trees and the vibrant, glowing undergrowth. Overhead, integrate abstract constellations and crescent moons, suggesting a cosmic canopy. Style is inspired by vintage botanical engravings and Art Deco geometry. High resolution, vector quality, perfect for apparel printing, minimal shading, graphic novel texture.
